Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

TABLE having physical and glossary asset relation

 

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

select md5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM) ,

MD5(ATLAN_GLOSSARY_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM)

from

 

(

select GUID AS ATLAN_GLOSSARY_ASSET_GUID_BK,

physical_asset_guid as ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK

(

SELECT DISTINCT

GUID,

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS physical_asset_guid

FROM (

SELECT

GUID,

REPLACE(LINKED_PHYSICAL_ASSET_REFERENCE, '\n', ',') AS physical_asset_rep

FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, LINKED_PHYSICAL_ASSET_REFERENCE

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_GLOSSARY_ASSETS

WHERE LINKED_PHYSICAL_ASSET_REFERENCE IS NOT NULL

)

) AS BASE,

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.physical_asset_rep, ',') AS SPLIT

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

ORDER BY GUID, physical_asset_guid))


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSA


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_GLOSSARY_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSAR primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_GLOSSARY_ASSET_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT set comment = 'Factless fact table having relation with Physical and Glossary asset';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'Dimensional Key';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GLOSSARY_ASSET_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_GLOSSARY_ASSET_KEY is
'Dimensional Key';
